reviews.comment:
Estación del ACA que tiene todo lo necesario para el viajero y baños limpios. Punto estratégico para realizar una parada en la extensión de la Ruta 23

(Translated by Google)
ACA service station with everything a traveler needs and clean restrooms. A strategic stop on the Route 23 extension.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar. En el.comedor del.ACA muy buena atención, muy buena comida platas abundantes y buen precio.

(Translated by Google)
Very good place. In the ACA cafeteria, the service is excellent, the food is very good, the portions are generous, and the prices are good.

reviews.comment:
Por no ser socio del automóvil club Argentina pero si socio de YPF serviclub me cobraron 500 pesos el agua del mate, se negó rotundamente a darme un tiket y para rematar estaba re fría el agua, si hubiera sabido q iba a estar así el agua me hubiera comprado un sobre de jugo y hacía tereré..

(Translated by Google)
Because I'm not a member of the Automobile Club of Argentina but am a member of YPF Serviclub, they charged me 500 pesos for the water for mate. They flatly refused to give me a receipt, and to top it all off, the water was freezing cold. If I had known the water was going to be like that, I would have bought a packet of juice and made tereré.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes, si el agua se cobra porque es agua mineral, no de la canilla, y en todos lados lo cobran hasta 1000 pesos.gracias por su comentario.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBMGFtN2xnRRAB

reviews.comment:

Good service. The place opens at 8 (for those taking the route earlier).

reviews.comment:
Ví el escarabajo más grande de mi vida (aparte te atienden re piola y tiene para cargar y todo)

(Translated by Google)
I saw the biggest beetle of my life (plus they treat you really well and it has charging facilities and everything)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfbDZhUVFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Desastrozo. 2 hs para que carguen combustible. Los baños cerrados xq estaban tapados. Tuvimos que usar el de discapacitados. Era para entrar con mascara del olor que habia. Para completar esta hermosa experiencia compramos un sándwich de milanesa que pagamos fortuna. No se que era mas duro, si la carne de vaca nerviosa o el masacote de pan que era 3 veces mas grande que el pedazo diminuto de carne.
De bonus track no traia aderezo ni daban ellos.
Un papelon. No paren en esta estacion.

(Translated by Google)
Disastrous. Two hours to get fuel. The restrooms were closed because they were clogged. We had to use the accessible restroom. The smell was so strong you needed a mask to go in. To top off this wonderful experience, we bought a milanesa sandwich that cost a fortune. I don't know what was tougher, the tough beef or the massive piece of bread that was three times bigger than the tiny slice of meat. As a bonus, it didn't come with any dressing, and they didn't offer any. A complete rip-off. Don't stop at this station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfd2NhamtnRRAB
